allow: Bash(node -e "const lr = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(lr\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('github'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('linked'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('link'\)\).slice\(0, 20\)\)")
